subcodes.first_line: O peoples of Bahá! Adorn your temples with the garment of trustworthiness and seemly conduct, and your heads with the crown of truthfulness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء زینوا هیاکلکم بردآء الامانه و الادب و رؤوسکم باکلیل الصدق و
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @wisdom [hikmat], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @courtesy; culture [adab]
